how.title: How BuyMap.ai works
how.subtitle: A futuristic semantic discovery engine — not a traditional marketplace. Describe first; intelligent filters appear after AI understands you.
how.what_body: BuyMap is an AI product discovery engine. You do not start with filters — you describe what you want in your own words (or show a photo). The agent understands intent, expands meaning semantically, searches across the internet, ranks the best matches, and then generates dynamic filters to refine live. No database, no registration, no login.

principles.describe: Natural language or photo — no forms first
principles.local: Your country and region prioritized automatically
principles.ranked: Semantic match score — not price-only sorting

how.filter_examples_intro: Filters are not static. They are generated per category after AI analysis:

filter_examples.car: Price, year, mileage, fuel, transmission, color, location
filter_examples.fashion: EU size, brand, color, type, condition

how.serve_intro: BuyMap is built for buyers who want clarity before they click through to a listing:

serve_items.intent: Clear AI interpretation of what you asked for
serve_items.marketplaces: Aggregated results from multiple marketplace sources
serve_items.ranking: Ranked matches with reasons why each item fits
serve_items.links: Direct paths to view listings where products are sold
serve_items.locale: English + your country language (from IP) — e.g. EN & SQ in Kosovo, EN & IT in Italy

how.features_title: Built for how people actually shop
how.categories_body: Cars, books, art, electronics, furniture, fashion, luxury, real estate, gifts, and more — one engine, many categories.
how.cta_text: Ready to try it? Describe your next purchase in your own words.

describe.title: 1 — You describe what you want
describe.body: One intelligent search box. Examples: “Audi A6 2020 white under 180k km”, “gaming laptop silent cooling”, or upload a product photo.

parse.title: 2 — AI analyzes intent
parse.body: NLP and vision extract structured attributes: category, brand, model, color, price, size, features — like a professional buying assistant.

expand.title: 3 — Semantic expansion
expand.body: AI thinks beyond exact words: similar colors (pearl white, glacier white), trims, years, and related concepts to widen smart matches.

geo.title: 4 — Location priority
geo.body: Free IP geolocation. Your country first, then neighbors, then EU/global — e.g. Kosovo → Albania & region → Germany → worldwide.

search.title: 5 — Internet-wide search
search.body: Aggregators query eBay, Google Shopping, regional stores, and curated datasets. Architecture supports new APIs and connectors.

rank.title: 6 — AI ranking
rank.body: Results scored by relevance, location, and fit — with match %, source, and “why this matches”, not cheapest-first.

filters.title: 7 — Dynamic filters (live refine)
filters.body: After results load, category-specific filters appear. Adjust price, size, year, genre, etc. Results update live without a full page reload.

semantic.title: Semantic, not keyword-only
semantic.body: Meaning and context matter. Similar ideas match even when wording differs from listing titles.

vision.title: Photo search
vision.body: Snap or upload an image; AI describes the product and feeds that into the same search pipeline.

geo.title: Location-aware
geo.body: Detects your region via IP and prioritizes nearby listings when you want local results.

instant.title: Instant, no account
instant.body: Real-time AI search with no registration, passwords, or saved profiles.

searching: AI is analyzing and searching the web…
search_loading_hint: Scanning live stores in Kosovo and beyond — results appear as soon as they are ready.
search_loading_hint_analyze: Extracting brand, size, price and location from your request.
search_loading_hint_workers: Valon agents are launching in parallel toward relevant stores.
search_loading_hint_federated: Collecting live listings from online stores — no static database.
search_loading_hint_rank: Ranking the best matches by relevance and price.
placeholder: Describe what you want to buy…
discovery_title: Not sure what to search? Start here
discovery_subtitle: Describe what you want in your own words — like talking to a friend. AI understands and finds live offers across the web.
trending_subtitle: What others are searching — one tap to try the same.
location_from_ip: Starting near :city, :country based on your IP. Name a country in your search to filter elsewhere.
filters_show_hint: Tap to open dynamic AI filters
no_results: No matches found. Try broadening your description.
travel_bridge_hint: Live flight prices plus train & bus booking links — BuyMap bridges you to official sites.
travel_bridge_hint_longhaul: Live flight prices from Google Flights — tap Rezervo to book on the airline or Google Travel.
travel_route_scope: Travel route: :route — live prices, book on official sites.
web_services_bridge_hint: BuyMap bridges you to official platforms — check availability and pricing directly with each provider.
web_services_bridge_hint_domain: See if your domain is available or for sale — compare GoDaddy, Namecheap, Atom, Sedo and more in one tap.
web_services_bridge_hint_hosting: Compare hosting plans from top providers — BuyMap links you to live pricing on official sites.
web_services_bridge_hint_email: Pick business email (Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Zoho…) — direct links to each provider.
web_services_bridge_hint_ssl: Find SSL certificates from trusted providers — pricing and setup on the official site.
web_services_bridge_hint_combo: Compare domain and hosting on official platforms — BuyMap links you to GoDaddy, Namecheap, Hostinger, SiteGround and more.
market_summary_auto: Expands automatically: city → country → region → worldwide
market_search_placeholder: Type a country, e.g. Netherlands, Germany…
market_multi_hint: Tap countries to select — pick as many as you need (up to :max).
affiliate_note: Buy links may include affiliate partnerships (coming soon).
footer: BuyMap.ai — Semantic shopping engine. No accounts. Real-time AI search.
